attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.AE_HEADER_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.AE_LINE_NUM, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.APPLICATION_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CODE_COMBINATION_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.GL_TRANSFER_MODE_CODE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.GL_SL_LINK_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.PARTY_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.PARTY_SITE_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.PARTY_TYPE_CODE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ENTERED_DR, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ENTERED_CR, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ACCOUNTED_DR, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ACCOUNTED_CR, TRANSLATE(STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.DESCRIPTION USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) DESCRIPTION, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.STATISTICAL_AMOUNT, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.JGZZ_RECON_REF, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CONTROL_BALANCE_FLAG, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ANALYTICAL_BALANCE_FLAG, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.GL_SL_LINK_TABLE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.DISPLAYED_LINE_NUMBER, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.CREATED_BY, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.REQUEST_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UPG_BATCH_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UPG_TAX_REFERENCE_ID1, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UPG_TAX_REFERENCE_ID2, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UPG_TAX_REFERENCE_ID3, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.GAIN_OR_LOSS_FLAG, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.SUBSTITUTED_CCID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.BUSINESS_CLASS_CODE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.MPA_ACCRUAL_ENTRY_FLAG, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.FUNDS_STATUS_CODE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.MERGE_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.MERGE_PARTY_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.MERGE_PARTY_SITE_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ACCOUNTING_DATE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.LEDGER_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.SOURCE_TABLE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.SOURCE_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.ACCOUNT_OVERLAY_SOURCE_ID, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES,
 (
 select  AE_HEADER_ID ,AE_LINE_NUM ,APPLICATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES
 minus
 select  AE_HEADER_ID ,AE_LINE_NUM ,APPLICATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CDC_XLA_AE_LINES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.AE_HEADER_ID = STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.AE_HEADER_ID and ACM.APPLICATION_ID=STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.APPLICATION_ID 
 and ACM.AE_LINE_NUM=STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.AE_LINE_NUM and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CDC_XLA_AE_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CDC_XLA_AE_LINES)
